ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the employee lives */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the employee lives */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code where the employee lives */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the employee lives */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "marriage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's marital status */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the employee's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., High School, Bachelor's) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "degree_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if a degree is required for this education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_fields" (
  "education_field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field of study */,
  "education_field" TEXT /* Name of the field of study (e.g., Computer Science, Business) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the field of study */,
  "related_fields" TEXT /* Related fields of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_education" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's education level */,
  "education_field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the field of study */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date the employee graduated */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the employee */,
  "degree_earned" TEXT /* Degree earned by the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_education_education_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_field_id") REFERENCES education_fields ("education_field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_status" (
  "marriage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Name of the marital status (e.g., Single, Married) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marriage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_history" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started the job */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee ended the job */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company where the employee worked */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the employee worked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job */,
  "min_salary" INTEGER /* Minimum salary for the job */,
  "max_salary" INTEGER /* Maximum salary for the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_departments" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started in the department */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee ended in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_companies" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started in the company */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee ended in the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR Manager, Employee) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the HRMS */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the HRMS was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distance_from_home" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from home in miles */,
  "mode_of_transportation" TEXT /* Mode of transportation (e.g., driving, public transportation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "num_companies_worked" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "num_companies" INTEGER /* Number of companies the employee has worked for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_working_years" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "total_years" INTEGER /* Total years the employee has worked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training program in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started the training */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee ended the training */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Completion status of the training (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the employee (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback given to the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name of the goal */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "benefit_description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_off" (
  "time_off_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time off request */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "time_off_type" TEXT /* Type of time off (e.g., vacation, sick leave) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time off */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time off */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_off_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_off_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
